stemHtml: An aircraft departs from Waypoint 1 at 10:00 UTC for Waypoint 2 which is 75 NM away. At a fixpoint 30 NM along the route the pilot realizes that the aircraft is 1 minute late. If the planned groundspeed is 90 kt, what is the new groundspeed that should be followed from the fixpoint until Waypoint 2, in order to arrive at Waypoint 2 at the planned arrival time?
